mnemonics: HIDE the Details: Highlight Interfaces, Define Essentials.
keyPoints: Abstraction simplifies complex reality by modeling classes appropriate to the problem.
It focuses on the essential qualities of an object, ignoring irrelevant details.
It is achieved in Java using abstract classes and interfaces.
commonMistakes: Confusing abstraction with encapsulation (hiding implementation details).
Creating abstract classes without any abstract methods, which is allowed but often a design smell.
